creator: tmikolajek@gmail.com
text:
Hello.
I have a problem with compiling Kernel after update from 6.2 to 7.0.
After updating my system a saw that i don't have quota i KERNEL. During
the compilation i have an error.

 cc1: warnings being treated as errors
./../../dev/ata/ata-pci.c: In function 'ata_pci_setup_intr':
./../../dev/ata/ata-pci.c:354: warning: passing argument 5 of 'BUS_SETUP_INTR' from incompatible pointer type
./../../dev/ata/ata-pci.c:354: error too many arguments tofunction 'BUS_SETUP_INTR'
***Error code 1

I don't know how to repair this problem. Please, help me. If you need more
info,please writeto me.

Thank you for reading this letter.

P.S. This is my first letter. Sorry, for spelling and grammar mistakes.
